rationale: Adds Bitbucket Data Center as a valid git provider for org claims. enterprise/server/routes/org_models.py extends VALID_GIT_PROVIDERS from {'github', 'gitlab', 'bitbucket'} to also include 'bitbucket_data_center'. enterprise/server/routes/users_v1.py adds the `elif provider == ProviderType.BITBUCKET_DATA_CENTER: orgs = await client.get_bitbucket_dc_projects()` branch to surface BBDC projects from /api/v1/users/git-organizations. Tests are extended in parallel: test_org_git_claims.py adds 'BITBUCKET_DATA_CENTER' to the valid-providers loop, test_user_git_organizations.py parametrizes the new ProviderType.BITBUCKET_DATA_CENTER case with id 'bitbucket_data_center', git-org-row.test.tsx adds a new it-block asserting the readable label 'Bitbucket Data Center/PROJ', and use-git-conversation-routing.test.ts adds a new 'supports Bitbucket Data Center projects' case with a fake claim object. frontend/src/components/features/org/git-org-row.tsx now renders `getProviderName(org.provider.toLowerCase() as Provider)` instead of the raw `org.provider`, giving the human-readable label. Feature addition with matching tests; clean.
